s: Audio Player synced with JaMuz Desktop
d: Audio Player: - Playlist editor (user tags, rating and genre) - Tag editor (user tags, rating and genre) - Replaygain support (MP3 only, FLAC on its way) - One finger control - Voice commands Merge your statistics with JaMuz Desktop - And so with all players JaMuz Desktop can merge with (Mixxx, Kodi, guayadeque,...) Sync files from JaMuz Desktop over WiFi - Select a playlist on JaMuz Desktop, connect JaMuz Android, and wait for your files. Remote Control for JaMuz Desktop
